name: Funding Credit
description_short: Funding Credit offers credit counseling, repair, and business credit building services alongside funding referrals and credit enhancement programs designed to improve credit scores.
description_long:
Funding Credit is a credit services company based in Concord, North Carolina, founded by entrepreneurs who emphasize understanding both personal and business credit needs. The company positions itself as a comprehensive solution provider for individuals and business owners seeking to improve their financial standing through better credit management.

The company offers a broad range of services spanning personal credit repair and counseling, business credit building with a stated $50,000 guarantee, credit boost/enhancement services claiming 10-14 day improvements, credit card stacking programs, rent reporting, and funding services for small business owners. They also provide guidance on credit cards and mortgage/real estate matters, along with an affiliate program for partners.

Funding Credit differentiates itself through claims of personalized solutions, responsive customer support, and professional credit experts who claim to have "helped thousands of people." The company emphasizes quick turnaround times—specifically advertising 122-point credit increases within 10 days in client testimonials—and guarantees on business credit building outcomes. Their positioning combines traditional credit repair with funding facilitation for entrepreneurs.

However, several important caveats apply: The website contains no information about licensing, certifications, or regulatory compliance for credit repair activities. Claims like "122 point increase in 10 days" and "credit boost within 10-14 days" are aggressive and merit independent verification, as such rapid improvements are uncommon in legitimate credit repair. The company does not disclose specific methodologies, pricing, or detailed service terms. Client testimonials appear limited and unverified. For consumers considering this service, independent research into licensing status and realistic credit improvement timelines is essential.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.
address: 8410 Pit Stop Ct NW, Concord, NC 28027

company_info.headquarters: 8410 Pit Stop Ct NW, Concord, NC 28027

pros: Offers multiple integrated services (credit repair, business credit, funding referrals, credit cards) under one company
Claims personalized credit roadmaps rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Provides business credit building with stated $50,000 guarantee
Offers credit counseling in addition to repair services
Provides rent reporting service to help build payment history
Serves both personal and business credit needs
cons: No publicly disclosed information about licensing, certifications, or regulatory compliance for credit repair activities
Claims of 122-point score increases in 10 days and credit boosts in 10-14 days are unusually aggressive and unverified
Website lacks transparent pricing, fee structures, or service contract details
Client testimonials are limited, unverified, and lack detailed outcomes or timeframes
No mention of affiliation with nonprofit credit counseling networks (NFCC, etc.) or formal certifications
best_for: Small business owners seeking to build or repair business credit alongside personal credit improvement
Entrepreneurs denied traditional bank financing who need funding guidance combined with credit repair
Individuals seeking multiple credit services (repair, counseling, cards, rent reporting) from a single provider
Business owners interested in credit stacking strategies for accessing multiple lines of credit
diagnosis: Funding Credit is best suited for entrepreneurs and small business owners seeking integrated personal and business credit services, but consumers should independently verify the company's licensing status and validate claims of rapid credit score improvements before engaging services. The lack of transparent regulatory information and aggressive improvement timelines warrant careful due diligence.
services: Business credit building program with $50,000 guarantee
Credit cards program and credit stacking guidance
Funding services and small business loan referrals
Small business line of credit assistance
Mortgage and real estate credit guidance
